Examples of Work Needed: Changing the colors of text/design on product labels. Swapping colors on hardware (e.g., winch hooks, accessories) from existing photos. General eCommerce product image manipulation. The Catch: You must be able to change these colors without ruining the original image. The lighting, shadows, and textures must remain completely natural. We cannot accept sloppy masking, flat colors, or unrealistic edits. It might be basic Photoshop work, but we need a true professional's eye for detail. Requirements: Expert proficiency in Adobe Photoshop (specifically masking, color replacement, and non-destructive editing). Strong portfolio showing before-and-after examples of eCommerce product manipulation. Excellent attention to detail edges must be clean, and colors must look authentic. title: Senior Production Designer — High-Volume Retail and E-Commerce (Long-Term)
desc: We are a Canadian brand and creative agency looking for a reliable, experienced production designer to join us as a long-term subcontract partner on a retail client engagement. This is not conceptual work. This is structured, brief-driven production at high volume. If you are fast, consistent, brand-disciplined, and comfortable working within tight guidelines on a repeatable basis, this role is built for you. --- **What the work looks like** You will receive creative briefs from our team with clear direction, approved brand assets, and defined specifications. Your job is to execute accurately and efficiently across a range of digital and print formats. Asset types include: - Email headers and banners - Paid social and display ads - Organic social posts and stories - E-commerce homepage tiles, hero banners, and product pages - In-store signage and retail graphics - New product launch assets across multiple tiers Volume runs up to 600 assets per month across approximately 40 briefs. Work is predominantly static design with resizing of master designs into channel-specific dimensions. --- **What we need from you** - Strict adherence to existing brand guidelines. title: Social Media Brand Awareness Campaign
desc: I am expanding my company’s online presence and need a partner who can plan, create, and run consistent campaigns across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn. The single, overarching objective is brand awareness—every post, reel, or article should strengthen recognition and reach within our target audience. You will be working with a mix of content formats: eye-catching images and graphics, short-form videos and reels, and occasional text-based posts or thought-leadership articles. I can supply raw product photos, brand guidelines, and any background you need; your job is to transform these assets into platform-optimised content, schedule them at the right cadence, and monitor performance. Key deliverables • Monthly content calendar covering all four platforms • 12–16 custom visuals (static or carousel) • 8–10 short-form videos/reels, edited and captioned • 4 written posts or mini-articles for LinkedIn • End-of-month performance summary with clear next-step recommendations Tools you’re comfortable with—whether that’s Canva, Adobe Suite, CapCut, Meta Business Suite, or native TikTok editing—are welcome as long as the output stays on brand and data-driven. Solid knowledge of platform analytics is essential; I expect you to refine strategy based on reach, engagement, and follow

title: Video Editor Wanted — Ecommerce Ads That Actually Convert (Not Just Look Pretty)
desc: I'm building a DTC ecommerce brand and I need someone who genuinely understands why people stop scrolling and how to make that happen in the first 2 seconds. This isn't a "edit my footage" job. I need a creative partner who thinks in hooks, feels the psychology behind a cut, and knows the difference between a video that looks good and a video that makes someone reach for their wallet. What the work looks like: 3–5 ad concepts per week Each concept has 3 variations , same body, different hooks and bridges I provide the scripts. You bring them to life. Formats: UGC-style, product demos, Reels, TikToks whatever the concept calls for, including AI-generated content if that's in your toolkit One brand for now. If we click, there's more. What I'm actually looking for: Someone who has edited ads that ran — not just ads that were submitted. I want to see your winners, not your portfolio pieces. If you've worked in ecommerce, DTC, or direct response and you understand the Meta/TikTok feed environment, you're already ahead of 90% of applicants. You should be obsessed with hooks. You should lose sleep over a bad transition. You should be able to watch a competitor's ad and immediately tell me what's working and why. The deal: $40–$50 per concept (includes 3 variations different hooks, same

title: Video Editor for Meta Ads
desc: We create paid ad creatives for eCommerce brands on Meta. Performance-driven, always on brief. We've worked with a lot of editors. Enough to know that what someone charges and what they actually deliver are two very different things. So we stopped guessing and built a deal that works both ways. We start everyone at $3-5 an hour. No exceptions. If your work is consistently good — on brief, on time, no hand-holding — the rate goes up. Simple as that. If it's not, we move on quickly and no hard feelings. What the work involves: — Editing all types of footage — UGC, talking head, product, lifestyle, testimonial — Meta ad formats for Facebook and Instagram What we need from you: — Clean edits, fast turnaround, clear communication — No disappearing acts, no revision loops on things already in the instructions To apply send: — Examples of video ads you've edited — Your average turnaround time per video We're straightforward to work with. We just expect the same back.

title: (Eastern EU) AI Video Editor | Direct Response Ads
desc: What we need: ✅ A video editor who produces direct response ad creatives for Meta. Performance-based! ✅ Videos are partially made with AI (AI talking heads, AI B-roll, or a mix) ✅ You receive the script and instructions from the strategist and you do the editing. ✅ 9:16 vertical format only To apply, answer this: ✅ Which AI models and tools do you use? Be specific. What works best for you and why? ✅ IMPORTANT: Send a Google Drive link with DR video creatives for Meta that you made using AI. Winners that got real spend. STORY SIZE 9:16. No link = no review Compensation: ✅ $30 per concept under 2 min, $40 per concept over 2 min (each concept = 3 hooks) You will do around 15 concepts every week. And that is around 2k a month. ✅ Paid weekly every Monday. After some time we switch to monthly ✅ Bonuses when a creative hits certain spend thresholds ✅ Full access to ad data and learnings ✅ Long-term position with room to grow Reply with MASTER at the top. Straight answers, no AI responses please.

title: AI UGC Video Editor 📍 Remote | $1,500–$2,500/month + Winning Ad Bonuses
desc: Summary As a video editor working for DTC brands, instead of actually seeing your work perform — You often become the "Head of Delivering Files" instead. From cutting briefs with no context, never seeing the data, juggling multiple clients, and getting feedback like "can you make the hook pop more"… Actually knowing if your creative works becomes nearly impossible. We know because we've been there. 🚨 And Spoiler Alert: It wasn't for us. So, instead of editing into a black hole — what if every concept you cut came with real numbers? Hook rate. Retention curve. What scaled and why. What died in 48 hours and exactly why. You know that feeling when you nail a hook and just know it's going to stop the scroll? Imagine getting to find out if you were right. Every single time. Fun right? Well, that's exactly what the AI UGC Video Editor role at our brand is all about. Working directly alongside our Creative Director to produce winning AI UGC ads — for a 7-figure women's fashion brand that has hit $100K days on Meta — while building the skills and knowledge to eventually grow into a Creative Strategist role. So, if this sounds like your kind of thing, and you like the idea of being a true creative partner with a real path to strategy — not just an executor — This opportunity is for you. A

title: Academic Designer Needed for APA 7th Edition Conceptual Framework Diagram Design
desc: I need a professional academic methodological framework diagram, clean flat vector infographic style, isolated on a pure white background. The layout is structured vertically from top to bottom into three distinct, color-coded sections. Top section is labeled 'K12 Schooling': It shows a horizontal flowchart starting with a square node labeled 'Asks Question in Class', pointing to 'Shame-Inducing Response'. This node splits into two parallel paths: a short-term path labeled 'Learns Help-Seeking is Risky' and a long-term path labeled 'Impacts Mathematical Identity'. Middle section is labeled 'Workforce Training': It begins with a square node labeled 'Re-engaging with Mathematics Learning'. An arrow connects this to a circular cyclic loop containing two nodes with two-way arrows between them: 'Having Challenges' and 'Embodied Mathematics Identity'. An exit arrow from this loop points to a terminal node labeled 'Help-Avoidance'. A prominent, dashed diagonal arrow labeled 'Justification Pathway' connects the top 'Impacts Mathematical Identity' node directly down to the middle 'Embodied Mathematics Identity' node. Because the deck is bilingual, I need someone comfortable aligning right-to-left Arabic alongside left-to-right English, making sure typography, spacing, and icons never feel cramped or uneven. From that, I expect you to shape a compelling professional summary, organise accomplishments under both skill areas and time-based roles, and apply thoughtful formatting—consistent fonts, spacing, heading styles, and subtle design touches that remain ATS-friendly. Final hand-off should include: • An editable .docx file using standard Word styles • A PDF export that preserves layout perfectly If you’d like to suggest strategic wording or layout tweaks along the way, I’m open to revisions until the CV balances clarity, impact, and polish.

title: Convert PowerPoint to Social PDF
desc: I already have a finished PowerPoint saved as PDF; I simply need it rebuilt as a polished, publication-ready file that I can post on both WhatsApp and Instagram. All the layout, colours and fonts are locked in—please use my supplied design exactly as is, no creative changes—so this is a pure production job. Scope of work • Re-create the file as a multi-page PDF optimised for fast loading on mobile devices. • Keep every slide in order so the document flows as an educational carousel post. • Make sure text stays crisp, images remain clear and page weight stays light enough for easy sharing on messaging apps and social feeds. Deliverable • Final multi-page PDF, ready to upload to WhatsApp and Instagram without further tweaks. I’ll send you the source file immediately; just return the finished PDF and I’m good to go.

title: Corporate Training Video Editing
desc: I have raw footage, slides and voice-over assets that need to be shaped into a polished corporate training video. The end product should flow logically, hold attention, and reflect our brand guidelines. Because this piece is strictly for staff training, clarity and instructional value come first: clean cuts, on-screen text where concepts need reinforcement, tasteful transitions, lower-thirds for subject names, and a brief animated opener that matches our logo colors. I’m open on overall style—fully live action, a hybrid with motion-graphics, or even a narrated screen-recording sequence—so feel free to suggest the visual approach you think will make the material most engaging. Deliverables • One finished HD video (16:9, MP4) ready for upload to our LMS • Separate subtitle file (SRT) for accessibility • Project source files so we can update content later if policies change Please let me know which editing tools you prefer (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut, etc.) and roughly how long you’ll need once assets are shared. I’m looking forward to seeing how you can turn straightforward training content into an engaging learning experience.

desc: I’m seeking a professional designer to create striking, polished covers for a current Cozy Mystery novel with more to come in the future. title: Creative Explainer Video Producers Needed
desc: I’m expanding my small in-house team and need up to four imaginative people who can turn our online courses into short, engaging explainer videos that resonate with a general-public audience. You might be a fresh graduate, a self-taught animator, or someone who has already cut their teeth on a few projects—what matters most is your ability to think visually, tell a clear story, and pick up new techniques quickly. If you enjoy experimenting with styles, pacing, and voice-over ideas, you’ll fit right in. Here’s how we’ll work together • I provide the course outline, key benefits, and any brand guidelines. • You shape that into a concise script or storyboard, refine it with me, and bring it to life in a 60–90 second MP4. • We review, tweak, and finalize both the video and raw project files (Premiere Pro, After Effects, or your preferred software). Acceptance criteria • Final video must clearly explain the course value to a lay audience within the agreed runtime. • Clean visuals, balanced audio, on-brand colours, and open project files delivered on time. If you thrive on creativity, communicate confidently, and are eager to keep learning, let’s talk and start crafting videos that make our courses impossible to ignore.

title: Creative Graphics Designer
desc: Summary Design social media posts, carousels, and story templates Create branded documents, one-pagers, and presentation visuals Build and maintain a visual system, templates, color usage, typography rules, so everything looks like it belongs together Turn complex, technical topics into clean, engaging visuals that don't feel like textbook pages What we're looking for: Strong portfolio showing brand consistency across multiple deliverables (not just one-off designs) Experience designing for education, science, or tech brands you know how to make smart content look good Eye for modern, minimal design, clean layouts, intentional use of whitespace, confident typography Comfortable working within an existing brand system (colors, fonts, tone) while bringing creative ideas to the table Fluent in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite Responsive and communicative , we move fast and iterate often

title: Cute Children’s 5-Minute Video -- 2
desc: I have raw footage of children that needs to be shaped into an engaging, “awww-inspiring” five-minute story. The finished piece should flow smoothly from scene to scene, using high-quality cuts, tasteful transitions, and a consistent, soft-and-soothing music bed that never overpowers the visuals. Simple captions will highlight key moments or dialogue, so please time them precisely and style them to match the overall cute, playful tone without distracting from the action. When additional text or lower-thirds are useful, keep them minimal and charming. The final export must be a polished MP4 ready for immediate sharing. I value fast, clear communication and punctual delivery, so let me know your estimated turnaround as soon as you review the footage. Deliverables: • One 5-minute, fully edited MP4 (1920×1080, 30 fps) • Any project files or assets used (so I can make future tweaks if needed) I’ll provide the clips and any branding elements right after we agree on the timeline. If this sounds like a fun project for you, tell me your approach and how quickly you can start.

title: Design High Quality eBook Cover and Paperback Cover for Amazon Kindle posting
desc: I'm looking for someone to design professional-looking, eye-catching covers for Steamy Contemporary Romance novels on an ongoing basis. This project will be for an eBook jpeg and paperback cover for Amazon Kindle eBooks. I'm looking for someone who doesn't take long to respond, and who can take directions and feedback well and can improve the model choice, if necessary, and make the copy sharp. I really need a professional designer who has excellent design and communication skills as this is my first book and I want the quality good for branding purposes for a series of books that will have a consistent look across all of them. Please submit some Steamy Contemporary Romance cover design examples, your typical turnaround time, your experience level, and education. title: Dynamic IG Reels Editor
desc: I’m looking for an experienced short-form video editor who can turn my raw, educational footage into punchy, dynamic Instagram Reels that boost reach and engagement. My content is strictly “how-to” and informative, but I need it to feel lively—not a lecture—so fast pacing, clever cuts, and eye-catching motion are essential. Here’s what I’m after: • A dynamic, engaging style that holds viewers in the first three seconds. • Consistent use of text overlays to highlight key takeaways and calls-to-action. • Well-synced music and sound effects that complement, not distract. • Smooth, creative transitions that keep the flow energetic across 15- to 30-second reels. I’ll supply the talking-head clips, B-roll, and any branding assets. You take care of sequencing, colour correction, audio balancing, caption placement, and final export in the correct vertical format (1080×1920). Turnaround is important; ideally each reel would be ready within three days of file delivery so I can maintain a regular posting cadence. If you have a portfolio that showcases educational or explainer content edited in a TikTok/IG style, I’d love to see it. Let me know how you like to collaborate and how many revisions are included, and we’ll get started.

title: Ebook Creation and Social Media Design
desc: I need a versatile creative who can move smoothly from long-form to bite-sized content. The very first task is an ebook: I’ll supply topic ideas and rough notes, and you’ll turn them into a polished, visually engaging publication. It may be fiction, non-fiction, or educational—my release schedule calls for variety, so I’m looking for someone comfortable with all three. Once the ebook is approved, I want to spin its key points into social media assets that drive brand awareness. Think eye-catching Canva or basic Photoshop graphics and a handful of short Reels/YouTube Shorts that tease the book’s highlights. A knack for logo and poster work is a plus because I often need supporting visuals for promotions. Deliverables • Fully formatted ebook (cover, interior layout, ready-to-publish PDF/EPUB) • 6–8 platform-ready social posts derived from the book • 2–3 vertical videos (15–30 sec) edited for Reels/Shorts/TikTok Timeliness and clear, friendly communication are essential; I aim for quick turnarounds and will share feedback just as promptly. If you learn fast and enjoy juggling creative formats, let’s get started.

title: Educational Video & Photo Editing
desc: I need a skilled creative to turn raw footage and stills into a polished educational piece. The core task is advanced video editing—adding thoughtful effects and smooth transitions that keep viewers engaged while never distracting from the learning objectives. Alongside the motion work, I will hand over a series of photos that need the same treatment: clean corrections, balanced color, and subtle enhancements so they sit seamlessly with the final video. My workflow is straightforward: once we agree on the structure, you receive the assets, share an initial cut, we refine together, and then you deliver the mastered file along with the edited image set. Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve, or any comparable professional suite is fine, as long as I receive the finished video in 1080p (or higher if you prefer) and high-resolution JPEGs/PNGs for the photos. If you thrive on crafting compelling training content with slick edits and cohesive visuals, I’m ready to get started.

title: Educational Video Editor Needed
desc: I'm looking for a skilled video editor to create an educational tutorial video for adults. The content is primarily tutorial based. Requirements: - Professional editing skills - Experience with educational content - Ability to engage adult learners Ideal Skills: - Proficiency in editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro) - Experience in creating engaging educational videos - Strong attention to detail and creativity

title: Engaging Movie Recap Editing
desc: I run a growing YouTube channel that explains entire movies in an easy-to-follow, fast-paced format. I’m ready to hand the editing over to someone who can turn my raw voice-over and footage into captivating, binge-worthy videos. Here’s what the finished cut must feel like: smooth, subtle transitions that never distract from the story; cinematic, copyright-free background music that builds atmosphere; and action-packed, dramatic sound effects to punch up key scenes. The pacing should keep viewers glued from the opening hook to the final summary, helped along by on-screen subtitles and light text animations that highlight plot points. Each project will involve: • Taking my narrated script and time-stamped clips • Crafting a 10–15 minute video with the elements above • Delivering the final file in 1080p (or higher) plus the project file for future tweaks I’m still a student, so my budget per video is modest, but I’m aiming for consistent weekly uploads and a long-term collaboration. If you love movies, know how to balance storytelling with retention tactics, and can meet deadlines reliably, let’s build this channel together.

title: Experienced Video Editor / Motion Graphics Designer Needed for YouTube Explainer Videos
desc: Experienced Video Editor / Motion Graphics Designer Needed for YouTube Explainer Videos (Long-Term Opportunity) We are looking for a talented video editor and motion graphics designer to create professional 1upto10 minute YouTube videos for our immigration brand. About the Project The videos will primarily focus on Canadian immigration topics and should be visually engaging, informative, and easy to understand. Video Structure • Professional presenter/spokesperson at the beginning and end of the video (real or AI-generated but realistic). • Motion graphics, infographic animations, charts, icons, maps, timelines, and visual storytelling throughout the main content. • High-quality narration and seamless transitions. • Modern, clean, and professional visual style. • YouTube-optimized content with strong audience retention. • Final Cut Pro • Luma Dream Machine • Other modern AI-powered video production tools Sample Requirement Before starting a long-term partnership, we would like a 1-minute sample video based on a topic and script provided by us. The sample should demonstrate: • Motion graphics quality • Infographic animation skills • Storytelling ability • Video pacing and editing • Overall production quality Long-Term Opportunity We have the potential to produce 100+ videos and ar

title: Facebook Ads for Kids Apparel
desc: I have a fresh set of product photos, lifestyle shots, logos and brand colors ready to go for the launch of our new kids-wear line. I also have headlines and supporting text to send. What I need now is a small, tidy library of finished single-image ads that I can drop straight into Meta Ads Manager. The focus is simple: turn my existing assets into attention-grabbing Facebook and Instagram creatives that speak directly to parents with young children. I’m open to your guidance on the exact dimensions that tend to perform best in feed and story placements, as long as the final files meet Meta’s current specs and are delivered in both editable (PSD/AI) and ready-to-upload (PNG/JPG) formats. Deliverables • 6–8 polished single-image ad variations highlighting key products, price points or promos • Each file layered and editable, with exports optimised for web • Clear, punchy primary text and headlines (optional but appreciated) Once you’ve worked your magic, I’ll handle the targeting and campaign setup myself—so just make sure the creatives pop, follow Meta’s 20% text guidance, and feel cohesive with the brand assets I provide. If you have ideas for A/B elements such as alternate colour treatments or headline swaps, include them; the more testable options, the better. Looking forward

title: Flyer Design for Graduate Degree Programs
desc: We are seeking a talented designer to create an engaging one-page flyer showcasing our graduate degree program options. The ideal candidate should have a strong eye for design and the ability to present information clearly and attractively. The flyer will need to align with our branding and effectively communicate the benefits of our programs. If you have experience in educational marketing materials and can deliver high-quality work, we would love to see your portfolio and discuss this project further.

title: Flyer for summer program
desc: Help to create a flyer for a summer school program. I have a draft flyer which I created in CANVA. Please feel free to edit it or change it as you see fit. The goal is to have a flyer that appeals to kids and parents ages 6 - 12. All of the relevant information is on the draft flyer. The goal is to have a draft flyer by Wednesday 10th and final flyer by Friday 12th June.

title: Fun and Colorful T-Shirt Design
desc: I need a fun and colorful, maybe witty slogan t-shirt for our family vacation in Puerto Rico. It needs to be kid-friendly and tasteful. I want to highlight the fun and adventure of our trip. The design should appeal to both adults and children, capturing the spirit of family bonding and travel.

title: Graduation Highlight Video Montage
desc: I have a folder full of raw phone videos, short camera clips, and hundreds of photos covering an entire two years of school including 11th and 12th I need all of that material shaped into one cohesive story, running roughly 6–10 minutes. Here’s the feel I’m after: open with a warm, nostalgic build-up that captures the years emotion, then shift into a faster, fun-spirited pace for the fun time that followed. Think smooth pacing, tasteful transitions, upbeat graphics where they make sense, and music cues that amplify both moods without overpowering the speeches. Deliverables • Edited video (MP4, 1080p or better) between 6–10 minutes • Clean audio mix, colour correction, and simple titles/lower thirds for key moments • One round of revisions after the first cut so we can fine-tune timing or swap clips if needed I’ll provide: – A download link to all footage and photos (organised by scene) – A shortlist of must-include moments and any favourite songs (royalty-free or I can supply licences) If you’re comfortable blending emotional storytelling with lively edits and can turn around polished social-ready files, this project should be straightforward. Let me know your usual turnaround time and any sample work that matches this vibe, and I’ll share the footage right away.

title: Graphic Design for Laptop Sticker
desc: I need a graphic design for a laptop sticker promoting the thoughtful use of AI by school students. The design should feature the school logo and colors, conveying a message of responsible AI use. The ideal candidate will have experience in logo design and graphic design, ensuring the sticker is visually appealing and effective in its message.

title: Graphic Design for Public Event
desc: Creating a 70.5in height by 31.5in width sign for a public learning event at a Toyota Store in Des Moines, Iowa. The graphic will be used on the web and should be visually appealing to attract attendees. The design should incorporate the theme of the event and be suitable for a public audience. We have a AI design to work from and are looking for quick turn around.

title: Graphic Designer
desc: We're looking for a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to join our team. In this role, you'll support our social media presence by designing eye-catching Instagram Stories and graphics that reflect our brand. This is a great opportunity for someone early in their design career who is eager to grow and make a visible impact. Responsibilities Design engaging Instagram Stories, posts, and other social media graphics Maintain consistent brand identity across all visual content Collaborate with the marketing team to bring campaign ideas to life Manage multiple design requests and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment Organize and maintain a library of design assets and templates Qualifications Proficiency in Canva is required; experience with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) is a plus A strong eye for layout, typography, and color Basic understanding of social media best practices and image sizing Ability to take creative direction and incorporate feedback A portfolio showcasing relevant design work (school projects, personal work, or freelance are all welcome)

title: Graphic Designer Needed for SherpaNest™ Setup Guide & Packaging Insert
desc: We're looking for a talented graphic designer to create a branded setup guide and packaging insert for our flagship product, the SherpaNest™. The primary goal of this project is to create a clear, visually appealing insert that helps customers quickly and successfully set up their SherpaNest™ while enhancing the overall unboxing experience. 🌙 About the Brand Kaomi Sleep creates comfort products designed to help overstimulated minds slow down, feel safe, and fully unwind. 🛏️ What We Need The main deliverable is a professionally designed setup guide featuring custom graphics and illustrations. We're looking for someone who can simplify the SherpaNest™ setup process and explain the various zipper functions through clear, intuitive visuals. The setup guide should visually demonstrate: 1️⃣ Unbox the SherpaNest™ and allow it to fully expand after removing it from the packaging 2️⃣ Place the SherpaNest™ on the mattress 3️⃣ Pull the elastic underneath the mattress like a fitted sheet 4️⃣ Zip the borders into place onto the sheet 5️⃣ Show that the side and corner zippers can be unzipped to lower the borders if desired 6️⃣ Show that the foam inserts can be removed through the zippers and the fabric cover machine washed 7️⃣ Enjoy your SherpaNest™ If space allows, we'd also like to include:

title: Graphic Designer for Small Logo / Graphic / Flyer Design (Short Project)
desc: We are seeking freelance graphic designers to collaborate with individual clients (students) on short, paid design tasks. This project is part of a university learning activity in which students prepare a design brief and work collaboratively with a designer to complete a real design deliverable. Each designer will be paired with one student client. Project Scope: • Deliver one completed design based on the student’s choice — choose only one of the following options: a) A simple logo or brand mark b) A social media graphic and caption c) A one-page flyer or poster • Provide an initial version and one revision based on feedback • Communicate with the client to clarify requirements Work Requirements: • Total expected effort: up to 2 hours, including communication • Communication may occur via Upwork Messages or short calls • Deliverables should be completed within the project window Required Feedback (Important for the Project): • After completing the design task, you will be required to complete a short feedback survey about your experience collaborating with the student client and working through the task. • Your feedback will not be shared individually; it will be used only in anonymized, aggregate form to support student learning and help inform improvements in the educational

title: Graphic Designer for Year Book Picture Layout
desc: My 2nd grade daughters picture was mistakenly left out of the school yearbook! She is heartbroken. :( I found out two other kiddos pictures were left out as well! I thought it would be great if I could get my daughters picture along with the two other kiddos made into stickers the same size (with their name) like the other pictures in the yearbook. This way the kids can stick the 3 missing kiddos pictures with their names in their books. Problem solved! Need to have the stickers by Tuesday June 9th 8am to the school. I bought special printer paper that is a large sticker and I can cut them out. I need a graphic designer who can make each picture the size (add the name under the picture in similar font) and layout the pictures so I can print them at home on the standard 8.5x11 and cut them out. I have all 3 school pictures of the kiddos that were left out. I will send you a picture of the yearbook so you can make it the same size and font along with the picture measurements.

title: Graphic designer needed asap for quick job
desc: Graphic Designer Needed – Recreate & Prepare Wall Branding Artwork for Print I’m looking for an experienced graphic designer to recreate and refine an existing logo/vision wall design for our company headquarters. The concept has already been created and I will provide the reference artwork. Your role is to professionally rebuild it as a high-resolution, print-ready vector design suitable for large-format wall graphics. Scope of Work * Recreate the supplied design from scratch in vector format. * Maintain the overall concept, layout and styling of the original. * Refine spacing, alignment, proportions and typography to a professional standard. * Ensure all curves, arcs and positioning are mathematically accurate. * Create a print-ready version suitable for wall vinyl and/or acrylic lettering production. * Supply editable source files. Design Elements * Central “S” logo. * Five stars beneath the logo. * Curved text above: “DEVELOPING SKILFUL CHILDREN” * Curved text below: “ACROSS THE WORLD” * Small globe icon replacing the “O” in WORLD. * Corporate navy blue colour palette. * Clean, premium, headquarters-style branding aesthetic. Deliverables * AI (Adobe Illustrator) * EPS * SVG * PDF (print-ready) * High-resolution PNG with transparent background Requirements * Strong typography

title: High-School Canva Template
desc: I need an editable Canva template that I can reuse across my high-school classes to keep worksheets, mini-presentations, and quick recap graphics visually consistent and engaging. The end goal is educational: everything should speak to teenagers—modern colours, clean fonts, plenty of room for images and short bursts of text. Here’s what will help me hit the ground running: • A master file shared as a Canva template link, so I can duplicate and tweak it any time. • Built-in layouts for title pages, content pages, and quick social-style summary cards (square format) so I can reinforce a lesson on any channel. • A cohesive palette and font pairing that prints clearly and also looks sharp on screens. • Placeholder prompts for headings, key points, icons or photos so my colleagues can drop material in without breaking the style. Because the template serves a high-school audience, balance is key—professional enough for academic use, but not so formal that students tune out. If you have creative touches that make the design more interactive or visually memorable, I’m open to them, provided it remains easy for teachers to edit. Once delivered, I’ll confirm everything renders correctly in Canva’s free tier and that the file stays fully editable.

title: Instagram Reels Growth & Editing
desc: I’m launching a brand-new educational Instagram page and want to hit 10 000 engaged followers within the next 8–10 months. To reach that milestone I need a creative partner who can both shape the account from day one and edit short-form videos that feel native to Reels—fast-paced cuts, on-trend sounds, and compelling hooks that make viewers watch to the end and hit follow. Here’s how I picture our collaboration: you’ll take my raw footage, graphics, or script ideas and turn them into polished, thumb-stopping Reels that spark conversation in the comments and encourage saves and shares. Alongside the editing itself, I’m looking for strategic guidance: advice on posting cadence, hashtag research, timing, and the small tweaks that boost engagement for educational content. Deliverables I’ll be tracking • 4–6 Reels per week, edited and optimised for Instagram’s latest specs • A monthly growth roadmap outlining themes, trend hooks, and performance targets • Analytics feedback after each batch so we can double down on what resonates I’ll supply the subject-matter knowledge; you bring the viral instincts, editing skills (CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or your preferred tool), and a proven record of growing pages around engagement. If that sounds like your sweet spot, let’s talk strategy and star

title: Instructional / Training Content Developer Build Course Modules (Content + Activities + Handouts)
desc: We are developing an 8 Module training program for organizational transformation on a technical topic (sustainability) We need an experienced instructional designer with strong visual design and PowerPoint skills to develop the full learning materials for each module, including the core training content, learner activities, and supporting handouts. Work will be delivered module by module so we can review and approve each one before moving to the next. This is a content development AND visual design role. We need someone who can take learning objectives and (often complex or technical) source material and turn it into clear, visually engaging, adult-learning-friendly material with polished, professional PowerPoint decks at the core, supported by other design tools where they elevate the result. Scope of Work 1. Training Content (PowerPoint-led) - Structured lesson content mapped to clear learning objectives - A polished, visually engaging PowerPoint deck(facilitator- and/or self-paced-ready) - Custom visuals - diagrams, infographics, process flows, data visualizations that simplify complex or technical concepts - Logical flow with intros, key concepts, examples, and summaries 2. Learner Activities - 2 activities per module (e.g. discussions, scenarios, case studies, quizzes, role-
